original_prompt: 给这个和田玉手串做一张淘宝主图，要求绸缎面为主色并且添加一下元素充实画面
optimized_prompt:
[Visual Description]
"Modern Chinese E-commerce [Jewelry & Accessories] scene, [Premium & Elegant] commercial photography style. [A bracelet composed of approximately 19-20 uniform spherical beads strung together in a single circular loop. The beads exhibit a smooth, polished surface with high specularity, reflecting light sources as sharp, curved white highlights on each sphere] located in the [Center].
[Props]: Surrounded by [flowing silk satin fabric folds], [scattered white lotus petals], [antique wooden tea tray] (enhancing value).
[Background]: [Soft pastel green and beige silk drapes creating gentle curves].
Lighting is [Studio Softbox with warm rim light], ensuring product details are sharp and the jade texture looks translucent."

[Text & UI Layout]
"***Layout Style**: Top-Bottom Standard (上文下图经典布局).
Text Rendering Instructions (Must be High Contrast & Legible):
1. **Main Title**: Content: “和田玉手串”. Position: [Top Left Negative Space]. Style: [3D Bold Songti/Serif with soft shadow]. Color: [Dark Emerald Green].
2. **Sub Title**: Content: “温润如玉 细腻油润”. Style: [Clean and sharp, slightly smaller than main title].
3. **Marketing Banner**: Content: “甄选源头好料”. Style: [Premium UI, e.g. '3D Gold Gradient Capsule'].
4. **Trust Badge**: Content: “大师精工”. Style: [Translucent Glass Badge with Gold Rim]."
layout_logic: Since the product is a circular bracelet, centering it on a soft, flowing silk bed creates a natural focal point. The silk texture (satin) complements the 'greasy/oily' luster of the Hetian jade. Text should be placed in the upper-left or upper-right 'negative space' where the silk folds are flatter, ensuring the copy doesn't conflict with the complex reflections of the beads. Using a dark emerald green font connects with the jade theme while maintaining high readability against the pale silk background.
